zh.lifeSummary: Jeanne de Créquy是Chevalier Jean IV de Créquy和Jeanne de Roye Dame d'Espourdon的女兒，出生在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯福雷辛。她於1415年之後與Guillaume de Lalaing, Seigneur de Lalaing結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1495年10月21日。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Créquy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Lucienne, Renold, Romain.  Spanish Alejandro, Eduardo, Beatriz, Juana, Mario, Porfirio.

Altered form of northern French Crequi: variant of Créquy, a habitational name from Créquy, a place in Pas-de-Calais, so named from Kreko, a personal name of ancient Germanic origin, + the suffix -iacum.

nameMeanings.name: Jeanne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: Jeanne de Créquy was born in Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France as the daughter of Chevalier Jean IV de Créquy and Jeanne de Roye Dame d'Espourdon. She married Guillaume de Lalaing, Seigneur de Lalaing after 1415. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 21 October 1495.

fr.lifeSummary: Jeanne de Créquy est née à Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, fille de Chevalier Jean IV de Créquy et Jeanne de Roye Dame d'Espourdon. Elle a épousé Guillaume de Lalaing, Seigneur de Lalaing après 1415. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 21 octobre 1495.

de.lifeSummary: Jeanne de Créquy wurde in Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich, als Tochter von Chevalier Jean IV de Créquy und Jeanne de Roye Dame d'Espourdon geboren. Sie hat nach 1415 Guillaume de Lalaing, Seigneur de Lalaing geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 21. Oktober 1495.

Lei sposato Guillaume de Lalaing, Seigneur de Lalaing dopo il 1415. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 21 ottobre 1495.

ja.lifeSummary: Jeanne de Créquyはフランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスフレシンでChevalier Jean IV de CréquyとJeanne de Roye Dame d'Espourdonの娘として生まれた。1415年以後にGuillaume de Lalaing, Seigneur de Lalaingと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1495年10月21日に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jeanne de Créquy(은)는 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 프레신에서 Chevalier Jean IV de Créquy(와)과 Jeanne de Roye Dame d'Espourdon의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1415년 이후 Guillaume de Lalaing, Seigneur de Lalaing(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1495년 10월 21일 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Guillaume de Lalaing, Seigneur de Lalaing após 1415. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 21 de outubro de 1495.

ru.lifeSummary: Jeanne de Créquy родилась в местности фрессин, пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция. Её родителей звали Chevalier Jean IV de Créquy и Jeanne de Roye Dame d'Espourdon. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Guillaume de Lalaing, Seigneur de Lalaing после 1415 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 21 октября 1495 г.

Se casó con Guillaume de Lalaing, Seigneur de Lalaing después de 1415. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 21 de octubre de 1495.
